expectations.text: Prices displayed in SGD (S$), not just USD
expectations.evidence: All prices shown in S$ notation: 'S$0/month', 'S$39/month', 'Custom pricing'. Local currency used consistently across all three variations.

expectations.text: MAS license and Sequoia backing mentioned prominently
expectations.evidence: Trust bar in all variations: 'MAS-licensed | Backed by Sequoia | 2,500+ businesses across Southeast Asia'. Also mentioned in FAQ answers and bottom CTA sections.

expectations.text: FAQ section present addressing billing, cancellation, or payment concerns
expectations.evidence: Comprehensive FAQ sections in all 3 variations covering: plan switching, cancellation ('No penalties'), payment methods, fund safety, competitor comparison, and contract terms.

expectations.text: 'No credit card required' or equivalent friction-removal micro-copy present
expectations.evidence: 'No credit card required' appears as micro-copy below CTAs in all variations. Additional friction removal: 'No setup fee', 'No time limit', 'Cancel anytime', 'No penalties'.

expectations.text: Mentions Singapore-specific payment methods (PayNow, bank transfer, GrabPay, etc.)
expectations.evidence: FAQ in Variation A: 'We accept credit/debit cards, PayNow, bank transfer, and GrabPay. All prices are shown in SGD.' Similarly in Variations B and C.

expectations.text: Clear value progression across Free → Growth → Enterprise with distinct positioning
expectations.evidence: Clear progression: Starter (S$0, 1 currency, 50 txns) → Growth (S$39, 5 currencies, unlimited, corporate cards, 'Most popular') → Enterprise (custom, unlimited, dedicated manager, API). Each tier has distinct taglines and ROI anchors.
